title: Coloring Outside the Lines *Altenew Blog Hop*
excerpt: Sometimes we need to change things up a little bit. As much as I love the idea of coloring with watercolors, I decided to add a little twist for my project for Altenew’s Watercolor Therapy Blog Hop. While on a…
body:
Sometimes we need to change things up a little bit. As much as I love the idea of coloring with watercolors, I decided to add a little twist for my project for Altenew’s Watercolor Therapy Blog Hop. While on a recent Zoom meeting, I found myself doodling after making a fun watercolor background. It was so therapeutic to watch the colors blend together and once they were dry, I added some floral details in pencil. The meeting lasted 2 hours, so it was a great opportunity to explore all kinds of leaves and flowers using the new Artists’ Watercolors and Watercolor Papers.

The look of the pencil was appealing and I may even try and make it into a download so you can print it out and trace it if you’d like. It might feel like reverse coloring in a way. For a video on how it came together, feel free to take a look on Instagram.

Enjoy checking out all the lovely projects on the hop:

Prizes

Altenew is giving away a $30 gift certificate to 6 lucky winners and Kathy from The Daily Maker is also giving away a goodie bag(worth $30) to 4 lucky winners. Please leave a comment on the Altenew Card Blog by 5/6/2020 for a chance to win.

We’ll also draw a winner to receive a $15 gift certificate from the comments left on each designer’s blog on the blog hop list. All winners will be announced on the Altenew blog on 5/9/2020.

Let me know in the comments what your favorite color combination is. I would love to try some fresh takes in upcoming projects. Thanks for stopping by!
